_comment: Card type registry. Authoritative source for card_type id → name mapping shared between TS client and Rust server. Visibility splits at id < 4: types with id 0..3 are 'public' (visible across players for trade subscriptions), types 4..15 are 'private' (visible only to the owner). The bit cutoff is enforced via packed_definition < 0x4000 in subscription queries; this file is the design-time labeling and the source of validation. Shape splits the type space into 'rect' (drawn as rectangles, stack into RectCard chains) and 'hex' (drawn as hexagons, serve as anchors that rect roots may attach to via stack_state == 11).

requisite._comment: Items / resources — logs, axe, food. Core trade goods.

blueprint._comment: Build plans — one card per entry in content/blueprints/data/. SoulPrivate.blueprints_0 stores the per-soul discovery bitfield; the wrench panel renders one card per known blueprint.

revery._comment: Memories — shared in-fiction via talk actions.

_reserved_3._comment: Reserved for a future tradeable category.

tile._comment: Per-hex override of the zone's packed tile data. Renamed from 'tile'.

mini_zone._comment: Anchor for a mobile zone (radius-3 hex disk, 37 cells) stored at (surface=63, macro_zone=this card's card_id). Renamed from 'tile_object'. The anchor card itself lives at surface=64 on a world hex; its mini_zone holds tiles and may carry other cards on its tiles. Owner of the Zone row (Zone.owner_id) is the player who deployed it; ProductOwner::Hex products inherit from that owner directly. See spacetime/server/spacetimedb/src/mini_zone.rs for deploy/pickup mechanics.

_categories_tombstone: The card-side `categories` axis was retired (see docs/CATEGORY_RETIRE_AND_TILE_EXPAND.md). Lower nibble of packed_definition's former category slot folded into def_id (u8 → u12). Block kept as tombstone; do not re-add unless you intend to widen packed_definition again.
